description: Join the live stream for the Polkadot Parachain Slot Auction, where nine project representatives will introduce their products. Participate in the auction and share a total bonus prize pool of 30 million USD starting at 1pm UTC. Voting for your favorite projects is easy and requires no wallet setup.
topic_summary: The Polkadot Slot Auction live event features project introductions and a chance to vote for favorites, sharing a 30 million USD prize pool starting [t=01:00].
